title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-server
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-server --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic` and resolve every warning (currently 57 — by far the largest count in the workspace). Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, missing_errors_doc, must_use_candidate, uninlined_format_args, unused_async (note: `unused_async` on `run_fake_supervisor` is a false positive — the helper hosts a future even though no `.await` is in its body; allow that one with a comment).

Acceptance criteria:
- `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-server --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings` exits 0.
- No blanket `#[allow(clippy::pedantic)]` or `#[allow(...)]` over whole modules — fix the underlying issues, only allow specific lints with a one-line justification comment when the pedantic suggestion is genuinely worse.
- All existing tests still pass (`cargo test -p crossbridge-server`), including the `end_to_end` and `oversized_frame` integration tests.
- `cargo fmt --check` clean.
